CustomField.description: Days remaining until this Contract's subscription ends. Formula = Subscription_End_Date__c - TODAY. Returns null if Subscription_End_Date__c is blank (the data-quality-signal pattern). Negative values mean the subscription has already expired. Read by the renewal-creation job to decide when to spawn the renewal Opp.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days until subscription end. Negative = already expired.
CustomField.label: Days To Renewal
